quotes.author: Antonie van Leeuwenhoek
quotes.quote: Among all the marvels I have discovered in nature, these are the most marvelous of all.

quotes.author: Louis Pasteur
quotes.quote: The role of the infinitely small in nature is infinitely great.

quotes.author: Stephen Jay Gould
quotes.quote: This is truly the 'age of bacteria'—as it was in the beginning, is now and ever shall be.

quotes.author: Lynn Margulis
quotes.quote: Bacteria are the hidden alchemists of the planet, shaping the atmosphere and the future.

quotes.author: Joshua Lederberg
quotes.quote: Microbiology offers an understanding of the hidden world of microbes that is essential for understanding our own biology.

quotes.author: Stuart B. Levy
quotes.quote: If you don't like bacteria, you're on the wrong planet.

analysis.introduction: The captured sample displays highly defined multicellular structures...
morphologyBullets: Elongated, cylindrical cells forming distinct trichomes.
